specs.title: cp-000: Slash suggestions are allowed at the start of a block
cp-001: Slash suggestions are also allowed immediately after a space character
cp-002: Slash suggestions are not allowed in the middle of a word with no preceding spac
cp-003: Slash query filtering matches against command title description and category tex
cp-004: Slash command Text label is Text
cp-005: Slash command Text description is Plain paragraph text
cp-006: Slash command Text converts the current block to a paragraph
cp-007: Slash command Heading 1 description is Manuscript title
cp-008: Slash command Heading 1 shortcut label is CmdShift1
cp-009: Slash command Heading 1 sets the current block to heading level 1
cp-010: Slash command Heading 2 description is IMRAD sections
cp-011: Slash command Heading 2 shortcut label is CmdShift2
cp-012: Slash command Heading 2 sets the current block to heading level 2
cp-013: Slash command Heading 3 description is Subsections
cp-014: Slash command Heading 3 shortcut label is CmdShift3
cp-015: Slash command Heading 3 sets the current block to heading level 3
cp-016: Slash command Heading 4 description is Sub-subsections
cp-017: Slash command Heading 4 shortcut label is CmdShift4
cp-018: Slash command Heading 4 sets the current block to heading level 4
cp-019: Slash command Bullet List description is Unordered list
cp-020: Slash command Bullet List shortcut label is CmdShift8
cp-021: Slash command Bullet List toggles the current block into a bullet list
cp-022: Slash command Numbered List description is Ordered list
cp-023: Slash command Numbered List shortcut label is CmdShift7
cp-024: Slash command Numbered List toggles the current block into an ordered list
cp-025: Slash command Checklist description is Task checklist
cp-026: Slash command Checklist shortcut label is CmdShift9
cp-027: Slash command Checklist toggles a task list
cp-028: Slash command Block Quote description is Quote text
cp-029: Slash command Block Quote toggles a blockquote
cp-030: Slash command Divider description is Horizontal rule
cp-031: Slash command Divider inserts a horizontal rule
cp-032: Slash command Code Block description is For statistical code
cp-033: Slash command Code Block toggles a code block using StarterKit
cp-034: Slash command Table description is Insert data table
